zh.lifeSummary: 當Bartholomew Collingridge於1383年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆時，他的父親John Collingridge34歲，母親Margaret FitzAlan31歲。他於大約1410年與Alice de Arundel在英國英格蘭奧可福爾坦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1470年在英國巴金哈姆爾梅德納姆享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bartholomew Collingridge于1383年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆时，他的父亲John Collingridge34岁，母亲Margaret FitzAlan31岁。他于大约1410年与Alice de Arundel在英国英格兰奧可福爾坦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1470年在英国巴金哈姆爾梅德納姆享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Collingridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name perhaps from Cowan Bridge in Lancs, recorded as Collingbrigke in about 1200.

nameMeanings.name: Bartholomew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin, the name of an apostle mentioned in all the synoptic gospels (Matthew, Mark, and Luke) and in the Acts of the Apostles. It is an Aramaic formation meaning ‘son of Talmai’, and has been assumed by many scholars to be a byname of the apostle Nathaniel . Talmai is a Hebrew name, said to mean ‘abounding in furrows’ (Numbers 13:22).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Bartholomew Collingridge was born in 1383, in West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, John Collingridge, was 34 and his mother, Margaret FitzAlan, was 31. He married Alice de Arundel about 1410, in Thame, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1470, in Medmenham, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bartholomew Collingridge est né en 1383, à West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John Collingridge, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret FitzAlan, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Arundel environ 1410, à Thame, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1470, à Medmenham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bartholomew Collingridge 1383 in West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Collingridge 34 und seine Mutter Margaret FitzAlan 31. Er hat um 1410 in Thame, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Alice de Arundel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1470 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Medmenham, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bartholomew Collingridge è nato il nel 1383 nel West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, John Collingridge, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margaret FitzAlan, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Arundel circa 1410, nel Thame, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1470, nel Medmenham, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bartholomew Collingridgeが1383年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエスト ウイコンベで生まれた時，父John Collingridgeは34歳，母Margaret FitzAlanは31歳であった。約1410年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアサムでAlice de Arundelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1470年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアメドメンハムで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bartholomew Collingridge(이)가 1383년 영국 벅잉함실르 웨스트 윈이코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Collingridge(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret FitzAlan(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 섬에서 Alice de Arundel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1470년 영국 벅잉함실르 메드멘함에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bartholomew Collingridge nasceu em 1383, em West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Collingridge, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret FitzAlan, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Arundel aproximadamente 1410, em Thame, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1470, em Medmenham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bartholomew Collingridge родился в 1383 г. в местности вест викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Collingridge было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret FitzAlan, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Arundel около 1410 г. в местности там, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1470 г. в местности медменам, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bartholomew Collingridge nació en 1383, en West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Collingridge, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret FitzAlan, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Alice de Arundel aproximadamente 1410, en Thame, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1470, en Medmenham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 87 años.
